stemHtml: Select the correct option regarding smoke detectors used in modern transport aeroplanes.

options.a: In a labyrinth optical smoke detector, the light source is refracted away from the sensor by the smoke particles.
options.b: In a labyrinth optical smoke detector, the light source is shielded from the photoelectric sensor.
options.c: In a light attenuation optical smoke detector, the light source is refracted on to the sensor by the smoke particles.
options.d: In a light attenuation optical smoke detector, the light source is shielded from the photoelectric sensor.
